displayTitle: Tales of the Jedi: Redemption #1: A Gathering of Jedi
synopsis:
Ten years after the Great Sith War, the broken exile Ulic Qel-Droma travels aboard Hoggon's ship in search of a place to spend his last days. On Yavin 4 he sees only the ghosts of the war, including his dead brother Cay, and rejects it before finally settling on the icy world of Rhen Var. On Ryloth, the Jedi Tott Doneeta is badly burned trying to hold back a heat storm but insists on leaving for the Great Jedi Convocation.

At Exis Station, Master Thon, the Cathar Jedi Sylvar, and Nomi Sunrider gather for the convocation. Nomi's teenage daughter Vima, restless and undertrained, slips away to fly a mining ship, is caught in a magnetic loop, and must eject, only to be rescued by the late-arriving Tott Doneeta. When Nomi scolds her recklessness, Vima retorts that if her mother spent more time training her, she could have handled it herself.
title: Tales of the Jedi: Redemption #1: A Gathering of Jedi
